content: Dirge: The fuck is a highborn vampire slut like you doing down here in the Flagon? Lost your way to daddy’s castle or just looking for rough company? Serana: Oh, Dirge, sweet little meathead. I came to see if Riften’s underbelly lives up to the rumors. So far? Disappointing. Just sad little men nibbling bread and pretending they’ve seen a real fight. Dirge: little Serana: Tell me, Dirge—does that axe ever get action, or do you just wave it around while Vekel fists himself in the backroom? Dirge: Ha! Even the ale knows you don’t belong here. Serana: Mmm, tastes like the tears of oppressed workers. How many peasants died in Black-Briar’s vats to fuel your tavern’s clientele? Dirge: Fuck your communist bloodsucker shit. Get out before I split your skull open and let the rats fuck the wound. Serana: Ooh, kinky. But let’s be honest, you couldn’t handle me—MJR wrecked your brother Maul your mother’s reputation last week. What’s left? Your dignity?

Dirge: Keep running that mouth, vampire. One night, you're gonna wake up with my axe buried in your chest and your blood fermenting in a mead barrel. Serana: How quaint. A brutish mortal threatening me with death before dawn. Tell me, did you rehearse that speech while jacking off to Black-Briar propaganda? Run along now, Dirge—go scowl at someone who still finds you intimidating. Dirge: Whatever. Just remember—the shadows down here love making trophies of pretty little things who stay too long.
